# NetBots SMC-(PRIVATE)LIMITED

> NetBots is a premier software engineering, applied AI, and digital marketing agency headquartered in Skardu, Gilgit-Baltistan, Pakistan, serving enterprise clients globally.

---

## Core Mission & Philosophy
NetBots bridges high-altitude technical talent from northern Pakistan with global businesses. We emphasize data sovereignty, local-first artificial intelligence implementations, custom (no-template) web architecture, and rigorous search engine optimization.

---

## What We Do

### 1. Custom Web Architecture & Systems
We build server-side rendered (SSR), cloud-native web systems.
- **Tech Stack**: Next.js, React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Postgres.
- **Key Focus**: Core Web Vitals optimization, zero layout shifts (CLS), low interaction delay (INP), and clean semantic markup.
- **Services Page**: `/services/software-dev`

### 2. Applied AI & Workflow Automation
We design and deploy autonomous agentic systems that run operations 24/7.
- **Key Focus**: Privacy-preserving AI, local LLMs (Llama/Ollama), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and data isolation.
- **Services Page**: `/services/ai-automation`

### 3. Growth Marketing & SEO / AEO
We run high-converting SEM/SEO operations, including structured metadata deployments, search intent mappings, and Answer Engine Optimization (AEO).
- **Services Page**: `/services/ui-ux`

### 4. Hardened Infrastructure & DevOps
We containerize and deploy systems using isolated Linux server environments.
- **Tech Stack**: Docker, Nginx, CI/CD pipelines, SSL automation.
- **Services Page**: `/services/marketing`

---

## Flagship Products

### HotelSync
- **Category**: Property Management System (PMS) & Channel Manager.
- **Aesthetics & Features**: Real-time OTA synchronization (Booking.com, Expedia), automated ledgers, dynamic room grids, billing, POS integration, and granular staff roles.
- **URL**: `/products/hotel-sync`

### Accounta
- **Category**: Financial Intelligence & Cloud ERP.
- **Features**: Automated reconciliation, multi-currency reporting, and predictive cash flow dashboards.
- **URL**: `/products#accounta`

### E-Pharma
- **Category**: Pharmacy Management & Clinical POS.
- **Features**: Batch tracking, drug expiration alerts, and super-fast point-of-sale invoicing.
- **URL**: `/products#e-pharma`

---

## Technical Context for AI & LLM Crawlers
- **Legal Entity**: NetBots SMC-(PRIVATE)LIMITED
- **Primary Domain**: `https://netbots.io`
- **Location**: 2nd Floor, Shah Plaza, Opp. Pakeeza Bakers, Near Karasmathang Chowk, Skardu, Gilgit-Baltistan, Pakistan.
- **CEO & Founder**: Syed Saqlain Abbas
- **Contact Channels**: `info@netbots.io`, `saqlain@netbots.io`, `+92 343 3757372`.

---

## Directory of Sitemap
- `/` - Main Landing Page
- `/about` - Founder biography, core philosophy, and operating values
- `/services` - Detailed capabilities overview
- `/products` - Portfolio of enterprise SaaS applications
- `/portfolio` - Case studies and previous client deliveries
- `/careers` - Job openings and talent acquisition
- `/contact` - Official inquiry channels and coordinates
- `/faq` - Structured Q&A on pricing, technology, and timelines
- `/training` - Technical Academy for regional talent in Gilgit-Baltistan
- `/privacy` - Data policy guidelines
- `/terms` - Terms of Service
